rationale: Factual reporting of Coty's early license exit and deal terms, no evaluative verdict on brand.
Plain factual coverage of the L'Oreal licensing accord and its scale, no independent judgment expressed.
SEA-focused factual framing of the beauty licence transfer as something to watch, no clear evaluative stance.
Gucci named repeatedly in Vietnamese counterfeit crime coverage, reputational drag though not brand-specific fault.
Background counterfeit prosecution case reinforcing persistent fake-goods association with Gucci in Vietnam.
Organic community cynicism about counterfeit enforcement, reinforcing Gucci's gray-market association among ordinary consumers.
Purely descriptive grassroots SNS promo of Gucci Visions exhibit with no evaluative verdict; activation coverage.
Genuine unfiltered community complaints about stitching, hardware tarnish and declining perceived quality.
Trade press on Kering's Asia-concentrated store closures signals retrenchment pressure on regional investment outlook.
Trade press cites SEA as a growth bright spot for Gucci with quantified APAC revenue share, but framing is region-wide not Gucci-specific.
